_doc: Issues accepted as known design constraint — LEAD suppresses counter increment + escalation for these issue_ids.

accepted_issues.npc_existing_scene_id_orphan_R75: R71.1 immutable NPC data — Mr.Long locked 14/5. sceneId orphans expected.

accepted_issues.npc_existing_uuid_null_R74A: R71.1 immutable legacy NPC seeds (Phase 7). UUID null acceptable for non-runtime entries.

accepted_issues.npc_extra_era_empty: Phase 14 scope: 9 extra eras stub for Phase 15+ content. Empty intentional.
accepted_issues.npc_ecosystem_cross_ref_missing: Phase 14 gap: adjacent CMDs (quest/item/boss/map) chưa ship /existing. Partial cross-ref accepted.
